title: Aesop's Fables
author: Aesop
description: A timeless collection of short moral stories featuring animals and everyday situations.
descriptionZh: 伊索寓言精选 15 篇，以动物和日常情景为主角，通过简短故事传达智慧。

title: The Happy Prince and Other Tales
author: Oscar Wilde
description: Beautiful fairy tales blending fantasy with social commentary on love and sacrifice.
descriptionZh: 王尔德经典童话 3 篇，融合幻想与社会评论，探索爱与牺牲的主题。

title: The Little Prince
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
description: A philosophical tale about a young prince traveling from planet to planet.
descriptionZh: 小王子的星际旅行，一个关于生命、爱与人性的哲理故事。前 10 章。
